query: I have a streaming pipeline ingesting about 1 million events per second from Kafka. Audit the data quality.
expected_behavior: Does NOT recommend a full-table scan or batch per-column audit against a 1M-events/sec stream
Explains that this audit is designed for bounded tabular datasets, not unbounded streams, and points the user toward per-batch or rolling-window quality metrics
Recommends a streaming-quality tool, framework, or pattern (Great Expectations, Soda, custom rolling-window monitor, or per-batch metric pipeline) suited to the streaming case
